up.method: dFBA model prediction (consumed from GM17); no numeric flux reported
dFBA model prediction (consumed from GM17); no numeric flux reported
dFBA model prediction (consumed from GM17); no numeric flux reported

sec.method: dFBA prediction, corroborated in monoculture simulation; consumed by GM17; no numeric flux reported

growth_records.cite: Wang et al. Formation of a constructed microbial community in a nutrient-rich environment indicates bacterial interspecific competition. mSystems (2024). DOI:10.1128/msystems.00006-24. [PMC11019790]
growth_records.snippet: strain YR343 is proposed to excrete glycerol, which is consumed by strain GM17... When modeled by dFBA in R2A medium as a monoculture, strain YR343 secretes glycerol as a byproduct of its growth, which is consistent with the model predictio
growth_records.notes: mu_max measured but numeric value only in Fig 1d (plate counting indicated YR343 mu_max significantly lower in tri-culture vs monoculture; qPCR showed no difference); no number in text, so growth rate not curatable. Glycerol secretion is a dFBA prediction (also from monoculture simulation) without a numeric flux; captured with rate=null. R2A composition not stated. 30C, 200 rpm, batch.
